scenario: Counter-offer — carrier quotes but with modified terms/conditions
subject: RE: Box Truck LA to Phoenix — Quote with Notes
body:
Jillian,

We can handle the LA-Phoenix retail delivery but with a few adjustments:

Rate: $1,650
- Includes lift gate and 26ft box truck
- Driver will bring the freight to the first threshold (front door) but we can NOT do inside delivery past the entrance. Our insurance doesn't cover interior building work.
- We can do the 2-hour notification window

Alternatively, if you need full inside delivery, we can subcontract a lumper service at destination for an additional $350 (total would be $2,000).

Pickup: April 18 morning works for us
Delivery: April 19 afternoon

Let me know which option works.

Desert Haul LLC
Alex Romero
(602) 555-0543

expected_bid.terms: Includes lift gate + box truck. Threshold delivery only (no inside delivery). Option B: $2,000 with lumper service for inside delivery.
expected_bid.notes: Counter-offer — doesn't fully meet inside delivery requirement without additional $350 lumper
